title: Slice of The Burg: Great Pizza in St. Pete
description: Slice of the Burg offers NY style pizza, vegan options, and more in St. Petersburg, FL. Order online for delivery or take-out.
heading: St. Pete's Favorite Pizza

title: Pizza, Cheesesteaks, Chicken wings & more in St. Petersburg, FL
description: St. Pete's number one place for pizza, cheesesteaks, chicken wings, and so much more. Take out, delivery or dine in.
heading: Pizza, Cheesesteaks, Wings & More
intro: A balanced diet is a Slice in both hands.

title: Slice of The Burg - Vegan Food, Vegan Friendly Menu, Vegan
description: Locally owned pizza restaurant offering a robust menu including vegan pizza, vegan calzone, vegan chicken Parm and more.
heading: Vegan Friendly Menu
intro: One of the largest vegan friendly pizza menus in the St. Petersburg area.

title: Catering Menu
description: Catering trays, salads, sandwiches, entrees, desserts and drinks from Slice of The Burg in St. Petersburg, FL.
heading: Catering in Tampa Bay

title: Healthier Options
description: Lower calorie salads, cauliflower crust pizza options, wraps and lettuce wrap burger choices from Slice of The Burg.
heading: Healthier Options
intro: Fresh salads, cauliflower crust, wraps and lower calorie choices.

title: Slice of The Burg - Top Fans on Facebook, Facebook Top Fans, Our Top Fans
description: Each month Slice of The Burg gives back to Facebook Top Fans with an opportunity to win an awesome prize.
heading: Slice of The Burg's Facebook Top Fans
body: Every month our Top Fans on Facebook will have the opportunity to win something awesome from Slice of The Burg.

Facebook automatically selects Top Fans based on their interaction with business pages. You can become a Top Fan of Slice of The Burg by liking and sharing our posts, commenting and engaging on posts, and by sharing your own photos and videos with us.
Facebook sends a notification of Top Fan status to your Facebook account. We do not pick and choose Top Fans.
No purchase necessary. No cash value. Must like us on Facebook.

title: Updates and Events
description: Stay updated with the latest updates and events at Slice of The Burg, your go-to for St. Petersburg pizza and online ordering.
heading: Updates and Events
body: Stay tuned for the latest Slice of The Burg updates, events, menu notes and specials.
